form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of five months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second last of 9 at Penshurst Penshurst Cup November 22 over 2000m, 13 len behind Chairman carrying 58kg at $10. When resuming last campaign tenth of 12 at Caulfield Bm80 Grand Hcp October 11 over 1700m, 7 len behind Blindedbythelight with 60.5kg at $101. Didn't fire last time in but is better than that.

Has the class to be figuring here.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months favourite; was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by a head at this track Bm56 March 17 over 1406m on a soft track defeating Port Louis with 61kg at $3.50. Previously second-up favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 0.8 len at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw November 11 over 1400m on a soft track defeating Kingsford carrying 57.5kg at $12. No reason she cannot get the job done again.
